description: Celebrate and enhance your feminity with these absolutely stunning and comfortable sandals from catwalk. With its vibrant colours and sleek design, this pair is perfect for everyday casual wear. Upper Synthetic leather thong straps Synthetic leather strap with floral embellishment across for traction and style Outsole TPR outsole with floral grooves for enhanced grip and traction Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
